ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chambers" (
  "chamber_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chamber entry */,
  "abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the chamber */,
  "chamber" TEXT /* Type of chamber (e.g., upper, lower) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the representative or position */,
  "num_seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats allocated for this position */,
  "boundary_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the electoral boundary associated with this chamber */,
  "chairman_id" INTEGER /* Id of the chairman of the chamber */,
  "vice_chairman_id" INTEGER /* Id of the vice chairman of the chamber */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chamber_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chambers_boundary_id FOREIGN KEY ("boundary_id") REFERENCES boundaries ("boundary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boundaries" (
  "boundary_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the boundary */,
  "boundary_name" TEXT /* Name of the boundary (e.g., Ward 1, Ward 2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the boundary's geographic or electoral significance */,
  "boundary_type" TEXT /* Type of boundary (e.g., ward, at-large) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the boundary */,
  "area_sq_mi" TEXT /* Area of the boundary in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boundary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "representatives" (
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each representative entry */,
  "chamber_id" INTEGER /* Id of the chamber the representative belongs to */,
  "representative_name" TEXT /* Name of the representative */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the representative */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the representative */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user entry */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Id of the user who made the change */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table that was changed */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Id of the record that was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the record */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "boundary_id" TEXT /* Id of the boundary the analytics data belongs to */,
  "chamber_id" INTEGER /* Id of the chamber the analytics data belongs to */,
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Id of the representative the analytics data belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., voter_turnout, election_results) */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics data was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election entry */,
  "boundary_id" TEXT /* Id of the boundary the election belongs to */,
  "chamber_id" INTEGER /* Id of the chamber the election belongs to */,
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Id of the representative the election belongs to */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., primary, general) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the election data was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)
